title: Regex recompiled on every eval call in str_matches_regex_pat
description: str_matches_regex_pat compiles a new fancy_regex::Regex on every call. Both :regex and :matches (glob converted to regex) recompile for every header x key pair x message. Already flagged with PERF(qc9j.1) comment. Expected impact: significant latency per eval when many headers or patterns are checked. Fix: cache compiled Regex objects in CompiledScript at compile time.
